differential_diagnoses: Chikungunya virus infection (with systemic inflammatory response)
next_steps: Send peripheral blood smear for thick and thin smears (repeat malaria testing)
Order dengue NS1 antigen and IgM/IgG serology
Order diagnostic paracentesis and analysis of ascitic fluid (cell count, differential, culture, albumin)
Send serum for viral panel (PCR for Dengue, Chikungunya, Zika, Leptospira)
Perform serial echocardiography to monitor myocardial function
Consider early empiric treatment for malaria (artemisinin-based therapy) despite initial negative test
Measure serum ferritin, fibrinogen, and d-dimer to evaluate for hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH)
